title: Continuity error re MAGI numbering in EoE
display_title: Continuity error re MAGI numbering in EoE
wikitext:
[]: Continuity error re: MAGI numbering in EoE?             Quote Post by svenge » Wed Jun 29, 2011 6:55 am One thing has bugged me about the 5-on-1 MAGI hacking sequence in EoE. From this screenshot linked below, you see that Tokyo-3's MAGI is 01, while Matsushiro, Berlin, Massachusetts [presumably M.I.T.], Hamburg, and Beijing have MAGI numbered 02-06 respectively. You would think that Nerv's Second Branch in Nevada [presumably "Area 51"] would have had a MAGI [especially since they were constructing Eva-04], and being the Second Branch, it probably would have had a lower number than either of Germany's [aka the Third Branch]...

[]:             Quote Post by biodude711 » Wed Jun 29, 2011 8:40 am Remember that NERV Nevada was wiped off the map by the failed Unit 04 activation test.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jun 29, 2011 10:46 am biodude711 wrote: Remember that NERV Nevada was wiped off the map by the failed Unit 04 activation test.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jun 29, 2011 11:49 am "Increase the Flash Gordon noise and put more science stuff around!"

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Jun 29, 2011 1:19 pm Everyone was bumped up a number because the guys at SEELE are borderline autistic anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Wed Jun 29, 2011 1:43 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: "Increase the Flash Gordon noise and put more science stuff around!"

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Jun 29, 2011 3:53 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: "Increase the Flash Gordon noise and put more science stuff around!"

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Jun 29, 2011 4:01 pm Azathoth wrote: OH GOD NO, THEY'RE HACKING US! WE MUST UNHACK OURSELVES FASTER!

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Wed Jun 29, 2011 4:07 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Everyone was bumped up a number because the guys at SEELE are borderline autistic anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Jun 29, 2011 4:14 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Reverse the reciprocal backflow through the 9th protective layer, offset the scan rates by 0.2%. We have to keep the packet loss to a maximum, otherwise we're looking at... ..ZOMBIES.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Wed Jun 29, 2011 10:42 pm Fireand'chutes77 wrote: That's what I thought too... *Chuckles at thought of one of the lowlier SEELE members spazzing out about it.* Kinda reminds me of that "We're gonna have to redraw the map again!" comment from episode 9.

[]: Re: Continuity error re: MAGI numbering in EoE?             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Jun 29, 2011 11:47 pm It's possible that the mass production of the MAGI system happened separately from the creation of the various branches and hypothetically we could suppose that Nerv's second branch was using MAGI 07. But probably I'm just trying to cover a hole (yet I find it more plausible then increasing the numeration after the destruction of the second branch).

[]:             Quote Post by arkiel » Thu Jun 30, 2011 12:16 am Reverse the polarity of the neutron flow...?

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Fri Jul 01, 2011 10:31 pm Monk Ed wrote: I don't get it. Why?

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri Jul 01, 2011 11:50 pm Fireand'chutes77 wrote: "Dang it, now we're going to have to go repaint all the numbers!"

Article: Continuity error re MAGI numbering in EoE
[]: Continuity error re: MAGI numbering in EoE?             Quote Post by svenge » Wed Jun 29, 2011 6:55 am One thing has bugged me about the 5-on-1 MAGI hacking sequence in EoE. From this screenshot linked below, you see that Tokyo-3's MAGI is 01, while Matsushiro, Berlin, Massachusetts [presumably M.I.T.], Hamburg, and Beijing have MAGI numbered 02-06 respectively. You would think that Nerv's Second Branch in Nevada [presumably "Area 51"] would have had a MAGI [especially since they were constructing Eva-04], and being the Second Branch, it probably would have had a lower number than either of Germany's [aka the Third Branch]...
